infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Travel Journal to use the camera to capture your travel photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Travel Journal to access your photo library to pick images for journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Travel Journal to save captured photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Travel Journal to use your location to tag journal entries.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Travel Journal to use the camera to capture your travel photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Journal to use your location to tag journal entries.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Travel Journal to access your photo library to pick images for journal entries.
